language.name: English
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_1: If for any reason the game glitches out and
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_2: you are stuck in a level with no way of escaping,
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_3: you can use /Trigger Softlocked to reset the level...
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_5: so you must do /tag (NAME) add OP
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_7: Note that this trigger should only be
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_8: used if you are SOFTLOCKED and not
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_10: If you encounter a bug, please report it to the discord.
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_14: And it will be fixed in the next update!
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_15: Here is every type of currency in Cake Team Towers.
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_16: Move the mouse to the currency you wish to view.
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_18: Tower Tokens are the main type of currency. They are obtained by completing the Tower and can be spent at the Token Shop on cosmetics, additional dungeons, and items.
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_20:
Cake Coins are the premium currency of this game, they can be obtained from playing but is mostly unlocked from transactions or to patreon members.

They are used to buy cosmetics and other items in the Premium Token Shop

If this is the world download of the normal version, Cake Coins cannot be spent on Premium Items and require the Premium download of the game. In the Premium download, Cake Coins are obtained much faster by reaching the top.
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_22: Every 100 Cake Shards convert into one Cake Coin.
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_24: Kai Coins are a special currency that can only be spent on Kai Island or shops run by Kais
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_26:
Time Gears are used for the Time Keeper quest. Every 100 Time Gears grant a level-up and an unlock. Time Gears are obtained by completing missions or sometimes from Command Boxes.

Max 1500 Time Gears
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_28: Can be used in the Otherside Protectors' shop
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_30: Stat points will boost different types of weapons or abilities,
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_45: you can gain stat points with items, level ups,
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_46: and some characters start with some.
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_31: You can view them in /Trigger ViewStats
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_32: Move the mouse to the Stat Points you wish to view.
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_34:
Red hearts is your normal health, similiar to your MC hearts, although in Towers it appears as a bossbar above your head.

When your hearts hit 0 you die. Your Red Hearts cannot go above your Max HP
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_36: Soul Hearts are like Absorbtion Hearts in Minecraft, they are hearts that can go past your Max HP
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_38: Black Hearts behave the same as Soul Hearts. However losing them causes all nearby enemies to take damage aswell
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_40: Blue Hearts behave the same as Soul Hearts, however they will only last one level and go away every Break Room
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_42:
Class Stat will boost a different stat depending on who you are playing as

Swans Boosts Strength

Check your class passive to see what it boosts
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_44: Strength is how much damage you do with Melee Attacks
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_48: Attack Speed decreases the time between Melee Attacks, and also gives you Stamina Regeneration
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_50: This effects how fast your Stamina Recharges overtime
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_52:
This is how much Stamina you have

Stamina is used for various special abilities that Melee Weapons have
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_54:
Archery boosts the damage of ranged weapons.

Archery also provides Arrows OR Bullets every break room. and Soul Arrows/Bullets too Press shift with the soul ammo to change which one you get
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_56:
Defence decreases the amount of damage you take

20 Defence is the Maximum, any additional Defence is True Armor Instead
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_58:
True Armor subtracts the damage you take based on your True Armor

(Max 75% Damage Reduction)
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_60:
Your Healing stat decides how many health crystals you are given.

Health Crystals is ammo used for Healing Items
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_62:
Regen will make you regenerate Health overtime.

1 Regen = 1 Red Heart Per Second
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_64:
Heal Percent determines how much health you heal after every break room.

The percentage is based on your Max Health, if your Health Percent is 25% and you have 200 Max HP you heal 50 Red Hearts
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_66:
Boosts the amount of healing you receive.

If you have 50 Bonus Healing Recieved and heal 100 damage, you will heal an extra 50 damage
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_68:
Behaves like Defence but only for Fire Attacks

Fire Armor will provide temp fire resistance when you fall in lava or touch fire
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_70:
Behaves like Defence but only for Water Attacks

Also allows you to hold your breath underwater longer
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_72: Behaves like Defence but only for Electric Attacks
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_74:
Behaves like Defence but only for Ice Attacks

Chance to freeze enemies when you take damage

Chance to Electricute nearby enemies when you take damage
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_76:
Behaves like Defence but only for Dark Attacks

Gain 2 Black Hearts per Dark Armor every Break Room
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_78:
Behaves like Defence but only for Light Attacks

Chance to not take any damage from attacks (% Chance Based on Light Armor Stat)
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_82: How much damage Magic Attacks deal
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_84:
How much Mana you have

Your mana regenerates faster based on how much Max Mana you have (Max 30)
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_86:
How high you jump

If your jump is in the negatives you take damage from jumping
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_88: How much Active Charge you can store
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_90: How much Active Charge you recieve every Break Room
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_92:
Grants you an additional Summoning Slot. Which you can use for Summoning items that will buff the power of your Summons. Does not work on any trinkets.

Also increases Whip Damage
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_94:
Gives you soul bait per Fishing Stat at the start of each level

Increases fishing speed

Increases chances of catching better fish
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_96:
Each Ant point gives you a different ability related to Ants

having negative starts causing problems
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_98:
Each point gives a different ability related to bees

having negative starts causing problems
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_100:
Given by doing good deeds.

100 Light Karma allows you to do an Angel Deal
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_102:
Given by doing sins.

100 Dark Karma Allows you to do a Devil Deal
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_104:
Given by completing Karma Dungeon Challenges.

Can be converted to either Light/Dark Karma at the Main Shop Churches
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_106: True Fire armor subtracts fire damage, cannot make attacks deal less than 25% of the original damage
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_108: Every Attack Range increases your range by 0.25 Blocks
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_112: Increase the jumping height and prolong the speed at which one falls from a high altitude to the ground
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_118: Depending on the quantity, Max Health and Coins will change each time you arrive at the break room
ctt_Lobby_Command_Block_123: How to install EMF & ETF Tutorial by
ctt_Lobby_Book_1:
Horriculture Growth Stimulatior Experiemnt
==================
Specimen 1:

Rosa Ignus
"§cFire Rose§0"

==================

Start date:
September 21st 2023

==================
ctt_Lobby_Book_2:
Day 1:

Specimen has been injected with artifical grown stimulant

currently being kept in medical tent

no notable results so far
ctt_Lobby_Book_3:
Day 3:

Subject is growing faster than typical, but has not gotten larger than any recorded instances

Subject moved to experimental flower garden so roots can spread
ctt_Lobby_Book_4:
Day 4:

Subject seems to be producing more heat that others of it's species

Nearby flowers also seem to be growing larger
ctt_Lobby_Book_5:
Day 7

Flower has grown to about 7 meters tall, about 6 1/2 meters taller than the larges recorded specimen

Heat produced by specimen is starting to become detrimemtal to nearby vegetation and uncomfortable to humans
ctt_Lobby_Book_6:
Day 9

Large explosion heard from site of specimen at apoxamately 2:23 AM

Currently investigating along with group doctor
ctt_Lobby_Book_7:
Day 10

Flower appears to have ignited the area surounding it, along with nearby Clematis Fragor growths causing small explosion

no damage to reasearch tent, flames under control
ctt_Lobby_Book_8:
Day 11

Falmes have stopped spreading, but have yet to disipate without outside intervention

Forcasted rain will likely extenguish flames

Specimen has stunted growth
ctt_Lobby_Book_9:
Day 13

Flame rekindled day after rainstorm, cause currently unknown

all experimentiation with specimen 1 shall be halted for the time being, growth serum to be further developed and experimented with
ctt_Lobby_Book_10:
Horriculture Growth
Stimulant Experiment
===================
Specimen 7:

Tulipa Gelus
"Ice Tulip"

===================

Start date:
July 7th 2024

==================
ctt_Lobby_Book_11:
Day 0

Specimen selected and experimination of growth stimulant resumed at request of associate

associate wishes for easy accses to snow and ice year round in temperant eviroment
(lack of frezer also given as reason)
ctt_Lobby_Book_12:
Day 1

Preperations complete

Specimen will be directly injected with newest version of growth serum shortly

subject will then be watered with mixture  of water, growth serum, and zunzite granules
ctt_Lobby_Book_13:
Day 2

Specimen has been moved from experimental flower garden to clearing in nearby woods due to rapidly increasing size

root network slightly severed in process due to non-expert assosiates
ctt_Lobby_Book_14:
Day 3

Subject growing rapidly now about 7 meters tall

shortest time to reach this height was previously specimen 2 taking 6 days, height only beten by specimen 4 reaching 8 meters tall in 9 days
ctt_Lobby_Book_15:
Day 4

Specimen has reached 10 meters tall

Frost produced is minimal, in order to fufill request watering  will be continued with mixture
ctt_Lobby_Book_16:
Day 5

Watering has ceased due to discovery of extremely frozen soil preventing more mixture from reaching the roots

Nearby plants have also started slowly wilting
ctt_Lobby_Book_17:
Day 8

after no notable changes for 2 days, flower has reached height of 30+ meters

Ground surounding area has started to thaw however

Surounding air is much colder
ctt_Lobby_Book_18:
Day 9

Rain storm has become snow storm in area near specimen despite time of year

other nearby areas still record rain
ctt_Lobby_Book_19:
Day 11

Most snow in area has melted with the expection of the area directly surounding specimen

Associate now requesting procces repeated on Syringa Caligo
ctt_Lobby_Book_20:
Day 12
Specimen has stopped growth at aproximetly 45 meters tall

Assiociate continues to request modification of Syringa Caligo for unkown reasons

Request likely to be denied due to danger of requested subject
ctt_Lobby_Book_21:
Please note that any minigames blocked off means that there are either no players online with the minigame unlocked.

Or the minigame is blocked due to a Towers run/Other minigame currently being played :)
ctt_Lobby_Book_22:
Only Up

1+ Players

Start from the bottom and climb to the top in a parkour map inspired by the hit game "Only Up"

Good Luck :D
ctt_Lobby_Book_23:
The Race

1-10 Players

Unlock Requirement
Sometimes appears in the Token shop to purchase

Race against your friends and AI in a horse racing game
ctt_Lobby_Book_24: Each horse comes with random stats, and abilities, let the best (or more accurate, luckiest) Jockey win!
ctt_Lobby_Book_25:
Jelly Trials

1+ Players

4 Parkour courses
themed around Swan Jellys Wallride ability

Good Luck :D
ctt_Lobby_Book_26:
Magum Trials
1-10 Players

A "choose your own path" take on the normal Tower gameplay, where you will progress through Magum's 10 custom levels!

Each defeat makes you stronger.
ctt_Lobby_Book_27:
Snowball Civilization
2+ Players (Recommended 5-10)

In this minigame you are sent into an arena where you must snowball fight the other players.

Collect Powerups to make your snowballs stronger and become the strongest!!
ctt_Lobby_Book_28:
being sad makes others sad

which means its a bad thing to be sad

but there comes a day to be sad, because sometimes being sad isnt that bad
ctt_Lobby_Book_29: can't belive i died, not that it matters, being a powerful necromancer and all, but it is weird being trapped underground, at least i have this book with me, probably should start trying to escape now....
ctt_Lobby_Book_30:
Step 1 Enable Server Resource Packs.

In the server menu. Click on the Cake Team Server. Click "Edit", and set "Server Resource Packs" to Enabled.

When you log in, the resource pack will download
ctt_Lobby_Book_31:
Step 2 Install EMF & ETF

There is a button to install EMF & ETF in this room. If you don't know how to install EMF & ETF. Click the button on the wall that will link you to a youtube tutorial.
ctt_Lobby_Book_32:
Step 3 Still not working.

If your item textures and models are still not working after following the previous steps. You can ask for help on the discord

type /trigger Discord for the link, me, and some others can help!
